policy: Only explicitly tagged active implant items trigger ImplantRules penalties. Generic cybernetics, prostheses, biotech, and droid systems remain distinct.
sources: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide

implants.name: Bio-Stabilizer Implant
implants.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
implants.notes: Immune to poison while installed and active.

implantEffects.summary: Immune to poison while installed and active.

implants.name: Cardio Implant
implants.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
implants.notes: +5 maximum hit points while installed and active.

implantEffects.summary: +5 maximum hit points while installed and active.

implants.name: Combat Implant
implants.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
implants.notes: Eliminates weapon nonproficiency penalties while installed and active.

implantEffects.summary: Eliminates weapon nonproficiency penalties while installed and active.

implants.name: Memory Implant
implants.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
implants.notes: Provides Knowledge reroll chat metadata while installed and active.

implantEffects.summary: Provides Knowledge reroll chat metadata while installed and active.

implants.name: Nerve Reinforcement Implant
implants.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
implants.notes: +5 damage threshold against stun damage while installed and active.

implantEffects.summary: +5 damage threshold against stun damage while installed and active.

implants.name: Regenerative Implant
implants.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
implants.notes: Doubles natural healing while installed and active. Exposed through ImplantEffectRules for rest/healing workflows.

implantEffects.summary: Doubles natural healing while installed and active. Exposed through ImplantEffectRules for rest/healing workflows.

implants.name: Sensory Implant
implants.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
implants.notes: Grants low-light vision and darkvision while installed and active.

implantEffects.summary: Grants low-light vision and darkvision while installed and active.

implants.name: Subelectronic Converter
implants.notes: Subelectronic Converter is intentionally metadata/manual except for its -2 Will Defense penalty while installed and active. Consult Jedi Academy Training Manual for droid-targeting Force power adjudication.

implantEffects.summary: Metadata/manual except for -2 Will Defense while installed and active. GM adjudicates droid-targeting Force interactions.
